titleStmt.title: SII 41.401: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 401. (A.R. No. 616 of 1905.) Tiṅgaḷūr, Erode Taluk, Coimbatore District. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Alagiyaraja-Perumāḷ temple at Tiṅgaḷūr.

summary.p: Records a sale of land for an amount of 100 paṇam to the temple by a member of Veḷḷāḷan Vaṇṇakkar clan of the village.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kovirācakecari panmarāṉa tribhuvaṉacca
kravattikaḷ śrīvirapāṇṭiyadevaṟkut tiruveḻutti
ṭṭuc celāniṉṟa tirunalliyāṇṭu patinālāvatu
kuṟuppu nāṭṭut tiṅkaḷūrc cuntarapāṇṭiya vi
ṇṇakar nāyanār Aḻakapperumāṉ koyil nampi
mār śrīvaiṣṇavar tiruccelva veḷaikkāṟaṟku meṟpa
ṭiyūr veḷḷāḷaṉ vaṇṇakkaril mukkaṉ piḷḷaiyāṉa
piḷḷaiperumāḷ tātaneṉ Avanperāl yiṭṭa paricāvatu
Iṉṉāyanār Aḻakapperumāḷ śrīpaṇṭārattil Ivvāṭ
ṭait taimmātam mutal tiyatiyil nāṉ koṇṭu kaṭava
paṇam nūṟu Ippaṇam nūṟukkum Eṉṉuṭaiya nilam kāṟkaṇkūla kaḻaṉikaḷil muṉṟu kaḻaṉi Aṟutiyā
vutākavum Ikkaḻaṉikaḷukku Ellaiyāvatu kiḻakkuk koṟṟaṉ ciṟuppiḷḷai kaḻaṇikku mēṟku teṟku Aviṉāci
yāṇṭār makan kaḻaṉikku vaṭakkum meṟku ciṟuppiḷḷaiyiṉ makkaḷ kaḻaṉikku kiḻakkum vaṭakku Entamaiyar kāḷiyā
ṇṭār kaḻaṉikkum ciṟuppiḷḷaiyār makkaḷ kaḻaṉikkut teṟkum Inṉān kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa kaḻanikaḷum Ikkaḻaṉiyā
lvaruṅ kaṇaṟum Aṟutiyāka Iṭṭukkuṭutten Ikkaḻaṉikaḷ paṟṟi Aṉupavippatākavum Aṉupavikkummiṭattu Āreṉumo
ruvar Etir vilaṅkal Anṟāṭukovukku Āṇaimāṟuvvetākavum Āṇaimāṟupaṭṭum nāṉ paṭa Aṟuaṟutiyāyc cantirātitta
rvarai paṟṟi Aṉupavippatākavum Ippaṭi cammatittu Ivvaṟutittiṭṭuk kuṭutten piḷḷaipperumāḷ tātaṉeṉ I
ppaṭikkup piḷḷaip perumāḷ tātaṉeḻuttu Ippaṭikku mukkātāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Āticcaṉ mukkanāṉa Ulakaḷanta
tātan Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kāṅkaiyanā Eñcapaḷḷiyil viyāpāri peru
māḷ tātaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ kuṟuppunāṭṭu tiṅkaḷuril Aruḷāḷan makkaḷil cokkaṉ ciṟuttoṇṭanāṉa raṅkap
perumāḷ tātaṉ Eḻuttu verkaḷ colla
taṉpaḷḷi māliru
Digital edition of SII 41.401 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
